__README: Curated per-100g corrections + Atwater exemptions, applied by scripts/fixFoodData.mjs and consulted by the validator. Entries with macro values REPLACE the DB row's numbers (source becomes 'manual' unless fdcId given → 'usda'). Entries with only atwaterExempt:true keep the row's values and document why the 4/4/9 check legitimately fails (alcohol 7 kcal/g, acetic acid ~3.5 kcal/g, carbonates, botanicals). Values are standard USDA SR/FoodData Central figures unless the note says estimate.

Water.note: definitionally 0; previous row carried a wrong FDC record (19 kcal with protein)

Cold Water.note: water is 0 kcal; previous row carried oil data (884 kcal)

Salt.note: salt is 0 kcal; previous row carried butter data (717 kcal/81F)

Sea Salt.note: salt is 0 kcal; previous row carried butter data

Salt and pepper.note: seasoning pinch, ~0 kcal at used amounts

Baking Powder.note: USDA SR 18369; carb-by-difference counts carbonates/starch that contribute little energy

Butter.note: USDA SR butter, salted; previous row said 900 kcal/100F (that is oil, not butter)

Milk.note: whole milk 3.25%; previous row carried milk POWDER data (446 kcal)
